tables.description: This subject phenotype table is  a questionnaire, including subject ID, birth year, age, sex, weight, eating, exercise, height, period, eating disorder treatment, race, ethnicity, etc.

variables.name: ANGI_Clinic
variables.description: How did you find out about this study? -Eating disorder clinic/service

variables.name: ANGI_RR
variables.description: How did you find out about this study? -Recovery Record

variables.name: ANGI_day
variables.description: How did you find out about this study? -Day hospital treatment program

variables.name: ANGI_doc
variables.description: How did you find out about this study? -Doctor or other medical practitioner

variables.name: ANGI_fam
variables.description: How did you find out about this study? -Friend/family member

variables.name: ANGI_np
variables.description: How did you find out about this study? -Newspaper

variables.name: ANGI_oth
variables.description: How did you find out about this study? -Other

variables.name: ANGI_rad
variables.description: How did you find out about this study? -Radio

variables.name: ANGI_socmed
variables.description: How did you find out about this study? -Social Media i.e. Facebook, Twitter, etc.

variables.name: ANGI_tv
variables.description: How did you find out about this study? -Television

variables.name: AN_sr
variables.description: Have you ever had anorexia nervosa?

variables.name: BE_agefirst
variables.description: How old were you when you experienced your first binge eating episode?-TEXT

variables.name: BE_agelast
variables.description: How old were you when you experienced your last binge eating episode?-TEXT

variables.name: BE_alone
variables.description: During eating binges, did you: Eat alone because you were embarrassed by how much you were eating?

variables.name: BE_control
variables.description: When you were having eating binges, did you feel that your eating was out of control?

variables.name: BE_curr
variables.description: How old were you when you experienced your last binge eating episode?

variables.name: BE_distress
variables.description: How upset or distressed did binge eating usually make you feel?

variables.name: BE_dur
variables.description: How long did you have binge eating episodes?

variables.name: BE_eatfast
variables.description: During eating binges, did you: Eat much more rapidly than usual?

variables.name: BE_full
variables.description: During eating binges, did you: Eat until you felt uncomfortably full?

variables.name: BE_guilt
variables.description: During eating binges, did you: Feel disgusted with yourself, depressed, or very guilty after overeating?

variables.name: BE_nohunger
variables.description: During eating binges, did you: Eat large amounts of food when you didn't feel physically hungry?

variables.name: BE_numweek
variables.description: When you were binging the most, how many binges would you have per week?-TEXT

variables.name: BE_onlylowt
variables.description: Did these binge episodes occur only during the period when you were at low weight?

variables.name: BE_week
variables.description: When you were binging the most, how many binges would you have per week?

variables.name: BN_sr
variables.description: Have you ever had bulimia nervosa?

variables.name: EDtreat
variables.description: Have you ever sought treatment for your eating behaviors?

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified Subject ID

variables.name: afraid_gain
variables.description: During the time when you were at this low weight, how afraid were you that you might gain weight  or become fat?

variables.name: age
variables.description: How old are you? ( years)

variables.name: age_hiwt
variables.description: How old were you when you weighed the most?

variables.name: age_lowt
variables.description: How old were you the first time you were at low weight or had anorexia? (years)

variables.name: age_nomen
variables.description: How old were you when your periods stopped?-TEXT

variables.name: birthyear
variables.description: Enter your year of birth.

variables.name: compul_eat
variables.description: Have you ever had eating binges when you ate what most people would regard as an unusually large amount of food in a short period of time?

variables.name: dietitian
variables.description: What types of treatment have you ever received for an eating disorder? -Dietician

variables.name: dietpill
variables.description: Which of the following have you ever used to control your shape or weight? 2. Use diet pills (over the counter or prescription)

variables.name: dp_age
variables.description: How old were you when you used diet pills for the first time?-TEXT

variables.name: dp_be
variables.description: Which of the following did you use during the period of time that you were binge eating?  -Weight loss pills

variables.name: dp_dur
variables.description: When you had periods of time using diet pills how long did they last?

variables.name: dp_freq
variables.description: How often did you usually use diet pills during these periods of time?

variables.name: dp_lowt
variables.description: Which of the following did you use during the period of time that you were at low-weight?  -Weight loss pills

variables.name: eddoc_cur
variables.description: Are you currently under the care of a medical practitioner for an eating disorder?

variables.name: ethnicity
variables.description: What is your ethnicity

variables.name: ex_age
variables.description: How old were you when you first exercised to control your weight and shape AND felt either compelled to exercise or distressed if unable to exercise? - TEXT

variables.name: ex_be
variables.description: Which of the following did you use during the period of time that you were binge eating? -Excessive exercise (e.g. feel compelled to exercise, feel uneasy or distressed if unable to exercise)

variables.name: ex_compel
variables.description: Have you ever felt compelled to exercise to control shape or weight?

variables.name: ex_distress
variables.description: Have you ever felt uneasy or distressed if unable to exercise?

variables.name: ex_dur
variables.description: When you had periods of exercise like this, where you felt compelled to exercise or you felt distressed if unable to exercise, how long did they last?

variables.name: ex_freq
variables.description: How frequently did you exercise during these periods?

variables.name: ex_friend
variables.description: Have there been times when you declined opportunities to be with friends in order to exercise?

variables.name: ex_ill
variables.description: Have you exercised despite an injury or illness that would have prevented others from exercising?

variables.name: ex_lowt
variables.description: Which of the following did you use during the period of time that you were at low-weight? -Excessive exercise (e.g. feel compelled to exercise, feel uneasy or distressed if unable to exercise)

variables.name: exercise
variables.description: Which of the following have you ever used to control your shape or weight? 3. Exercise (e.g. feel compelled to exercise, feel uneasy or distressed if unable to exercise)

variables.name: fast
variables.description: Which of the following have you ever used to control your shape or weight? 1. Fast or not eat (for 8 waking hours or more)

variables.name: fast_age
variables.description: How old were you when you fasted for the first time (i.e., fasting or not eating for 8 waking hours or more)? -TEXT

variables.name: fast_be
variables.description: Which of the following did you use during the period of time that you were binge eating? -Fasting (not eating for 8 waking hours or more)

variables.name: fast_dur
variables.description: Over what period of time did you engage in periods of fasting  (i.e., fasting or not eating for 8 waking hours or more)?

variables.name: fast_freq
variables.description: How often did you usually fast during these periods  (i.e., fasting or not eating for 8 waking hours or more)?

variables.name: fast_lowt
variables.description: Which of the following did you use during the period of time that you were at low-weight? -Fasting (not eating for 8 waking hours or more)

variables.name: feel_fat
variables.description: During the time when you were at this low weight, did you feel fat?

variables.name: had_mens
variables.description: Before this time had your periods already started?

variables.name: height_cm
variables.description: How tall are you? (centimeters)

variables.name: height_in
variables.description: How tall are you? (inches)

variables.name: ht_lowt_cm
variables.description: How tall were you then (at the time of low weight or when you had anorexia)? -centimeters

variables.name: ht_lowt_in
variables.description: How tall were you then (at the time of low weight or when you had anorexia)? -inches

variables.name: int_op
variables.description: What types of treatment have you ever received for an eating disorder? -Intenstive outpatient treatment

variables.name: lax
variables.description: Earlier you responded that you used laxatives or diuretics to lose weight. Which did you use?-Laxatives

variables.name: lax_age
variables.description: How old were you when you used laxatives for the first time?-TEXT

variables.name: lax_be
variables.description: Which of the following did you use during the period of time that you were binge eating? -Laxatives

variables.name: lax_dur
variables.description: When you had periods of time when you were using laxatives, how long did they last?

variables.name: lax_freq
variables.description: How often did you usually use laxatives during these periods?

variables.name: lax_lowt
variables.description: Which of the following did you use during the period of time that you were at low-weight? -Laxatives

variables.name: lax_wp
variables.description: Which of the following have you ever used to control your shape or weight? 5. Use medications like laxatives or diuretics

variables.name: lowt_mn
variables.description: How long did you have anorexia or were at this low weight? -months

variables.name: lowt_yr
variables.description: How long did you have anorexia or were at this low weight? -years

variables.name: menarche
variables.description: How old were you when you had your first period?-TEXT

variables.name: negconseq
variables.description: Did you ever think your low weight had negative consequences for your health?

variables.name: noICB_be
variables.description: Which of the following did you use during the period of time that you were binge eating?  -None of these

variables.name: noICB_lowt
variables.description: Which of the following did you use during the period of time that you were at low-weight?  -None of these

variables.name: no_menarche
variables.description: How old were you when you had your first period?

variables.name: nomen_mn
variables.description: For how long did your periods stop? ( Number of months)

variables.name: nomen_yr
variables.description: For how long did your periods stop? ( Number of years)

variables.name: ns_inpat
variables.description: What types of treatment have you ever received for an eating disorder? -Non-specialized inpatient treatment

variables.name: op
variables.description: What types of treatment have you ever received for an eating disorder?  -Outpatient treatment

variables.name: other_ill
variables.description: When you weighed much less than other people thought you ought to weigh or were at your lowest weight, was this due to an illness other than an eating disorder?

variables.name: part_hos
variables.description: What types of treatment have you ever received for an eating disorder? -Partial Hospitalization

variables.name: pc
variables.description: What types of treatment have you ever received for an eating disorder? -Primary care physician

variables.name: poss_ED
variables.description: Has anyone ever been concerned that you might have an eating disorder?

variables.name: race
variables.description: What is your race?

variables.name: resident
variables.description: What types of treatment have you ever received for an eating disorder? -Residential Treatment

variables.name: selfworth_be
variables.description: During the time when you were binge eating, how dependent was your self-worth on your body shape or weight?

variables.name: selfworth_gen
variables.description: In general, how dependent has your self-worth been on your body shape or weight?

variables.name: selfworth_lowt
variables.description: During the time when you were at this low weight, how dependent was your self-worth on your body shape or weight?

variables.name: sex
variables.description: Please indicate your gender.

variables.name: sp_inpat
variables.description: What types of treatment have you ever received for an eating disorder? -Specialized (eating disorders) inpatient treatment

variables.name: stop_mens
variables.description: Did your periods stop at any time during this time of low weight?

variables.name: studyrefer
variables.description: Were you referred by someone to participate in this study?

variables.name: treat_none
variables.description: What types of treatment have you ever received for an eating disorder? -None

variables.name: treat_oth
variables.description: What types of treatment have you ever received for an eating disorder? -Other

variables.name: twin
variables.description: Are you a twin?

variables.name: underwt_past
variables.description: Have you ever had a period of time when you weighed much less than other people thought you ought to weigh?

variables.name: vom_age
variables.description: How old were you when you began self-inducing vomiting for the first time?-TEXT

variables.name: vom_be
variables.description: Which of the following did you use during the period of time that you were binge eating? -Making yourself vomit

variables.name: vom_dur
variables.description: When you had periods of time when you were self-inducing vomiting, how long did they last?

variables.name: vom_freq
variables.description: How often did you usually self-induce vomiting during these periods?

variables.name: vom_lowt
variables.description: Which of the following did you use during the period of time that you were at low-weight? Making yourself vomit

variables.name: vomit
variables.description: Which of the following have you ever used to control your shape or weight? 4. Make yourself vomit

variables.name: wp
variables.description: Earlier you responded that you used laxatives or diuretics to lose weight. Which did you use?-Diuretics

variables.name: wp_age
variables.description: How old were you when you used diuretics for the first time?-TEXT

variables.name: wp_be
variables.description: Which of the following did you use during the period of time that you were binge eating? -Diuretics

variables.name: wp_dur
variables.description: When you had periods of time of using diuretics how long did they last?

variables.name: wp_freq
variables.description: How often did you usually use diuretics during these periods?

variables.name: wp_lowt
variables.description: Which of the following did you use during the period of time that you were at low-weight?  -Diuretics

variables.name: wt_cur_kg
variables.description: How much do you weigh now while wearing indoor clothing but no shoes? (kilograms)

variables.name: wt_cur_lb
variables.description: How much do you weigh now while wearing indoor clothing but no shoes? (pounds)

variables.name: wt_hi_kg
variables.description: What is the most you have ever weighed (not counting pregnancy)? (kilograms)

variables.name: wt_hi_lb
variables.description: What is the most you have ever weighed (not counting pregnancy)? (pounds)

variables.name: wt_loAN_kg
variables.description: What is the least you weighed when you had periods of low weight or when you had anorexia? (kilograms)

variables.name: wt_loAN_lb
variables.description: What is the least you weighed when you had periods of low weight or when you had anorexia? (pounds)

variables.name: wt_lo_kg
variables.description: What is the least you weighed since age 18, not including times when you were physically ill? (kilograms)

variables.name: wt_lo_lb
variables.description: What is the least you weighed since age 18, not including times when you were physically ill? (pounds)

tables.description: This sample attributes table contains sample IDs, body site where sample was collected, analyte type, tumor status, histological type, and name of the center which conducted genotyping.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: GENOTYPING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted genotyping

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: Is_Tumor
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID

tables.description: The subject consent file includes subject IDs, consent information, and case control status of the subject for anorexia nervosa.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject for anorexia nervosa

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: This data table contains a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs. The data table also includes sample use.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
